outcome_contract.why: Work can be marked complete even if it's missing key sections like engineering coverage evidence or outcome statements. Without checking completeness automatically, gaps only surface when someone manually reviews.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Validator pass/fail results are captured in workflow telemetry so completeness gaps are visible in reports without manual review

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: No UI component — internal telemetry data pipeline
No user-facing states — CLI and data records
Internal tooling reading local files; no auth, no user data
Telemetry system is itself the observability layer. Currently tracks script names but not outcomes.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Gap: validator outcomes not captured — this is the core deliverable
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Must capture pass/fail, error counts, and optionally blocking-issue details

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Existing tests cover record building, report generation, dedupe. Test patterns are well-established.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Gap: no tests for quality-metrics fields yet (they don't exist yet)
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Add TC contracts for new field construction, report rendering, dedupe inclusion

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `WorkflowStepTelemetryRecord` interface, telemetry schema doc v1.5.0, report generator output format
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Gap: no quality/completeness fields in the interface or schema
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Add optional field(s) to interface, bump schema to 1.6.0, update report envelope

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Append-only JSONL, no hot path — telemetry recording happens once per stage completion
Additive optional field — old records without the field are handled by existing null-check pattern

stage_payload.scope_summary: The DO workflow pipeline (fact-find -> analysis -> plan -> build) has deterministic validators that check whether output artifacts contain required sections and fields. However, validator pass/fail results are not persisted to telemetry. The `WorkflowStepTelemetryRecord` tracks script names in `deterministic_checks: string[]` but has no field for check outcomes. This means there is no way to measure artifact quality over time without manually reviewing each artifact.
goals: Capture validator pass/fail results in telemetry records so completeness gaps are visible in reports
Enable the workflow telemetry report to surface quality/completeness data alongside existing size and token metrics
non_goals: Adding new validators beyond what already exists (e.g. no new `validate-build-record.ts`)
Changing what validators check or their pass/fail criteria
Changing the validator invocation flow in skills
constraints: Must be backward-compatible with existing telemetry records (new fields optional)
Must not break existing telemetry consumers (`summarizeWorkflowStepTelemetry`, `computePerModuleBreakdown`, ideas rollup code)
assumptions: Validators already produce structured output (JSON) that can be parsed
The telemetry recording CLI can run validators inline or accept pre-computed results
stage_payload.process_trigger: Agent completes a DO stage (fact-find, analysis, plan, or build) and validators pass
stage_payload.process_end_condition: Telemetry record persisted, report available on demand

current_process_areas.Current step-by-step flow: Shell scripts run TS validators via `pnpm --filter skill-runner validate-*`; exit 0 = pass, non-zero = fail; JSON to stdout
current_process_areas.Known issues: Exit code and JSON output are consumed by agent but NOT passed to telemetry recorder

current_process_areas.Current step-by-step flow: CLI accepts `--deterministic-check` flags (names only); builds record; appends to JSONL
current_process_areas.Known issues: `deterministic_checks` stores script names but no outcomes; no `--deterministic-check-result` flag exists

current_process_areas.Current step-by-step flow: Reads JSONL, filters by feature/business, aggregates size/token/module metrics
current_process_areas.Known issues: No quality/completeness dimension in summary output
